role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no text on signs) and remained silent.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues (cloud forest, humidity).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant types (ferns, broadleaf evergreens) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road signs (yellow diamonds, chevrons) and infrastructure (concrete gutters).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized camera generation quality and cross-domain infrastructure patterns.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline failed because the RAG retrieval provided incorrect reference images (showing orange chevrons for Ecuador and Colombia), leading the regulatory agent and the tournament judge to incorrectly rule out the ground truth country based on a visual mismatch that was actually a data error.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of cloud forest and steep slopes match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of ferns and broadleaf vegetation match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of yellow signs and concrete gutters match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Observations on image quality and infrastructure style are consistent.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The RAG findings for the Ecuador match contained a hallucinated claim that 'the Ecuador reference shows an orange chevron' (contradicting the image which shows yellow signs). This caused the judge to reject Ecuador based on a false premise derived from the reference data, while Costa Rica had matching references.
